title: that + S + V（名詞子句作受詞）

formulas.zh: 主詞＋動詞＋that引導的名詞子句（受詞）
that 可省略，受詞名詞子句常採此用法

explanation: 此句型中 that 引導的子句作為主要動詞的受詞，該受詞子句內部具有完整的主詞和動詞。常見動詞包括 know、think、believe、say、hope、expect、suppose 等。重要特點是 that 作為受詞時經常被省略，特別在口語和非正式文體中。需注意區別：that 引導受詞子句（名詞功能）vs. that 引導形容詞子句（修飾名詞）。前者 that 可省，後者 that 在非限制用法時不可省。

examples.eng: I believe that he will succeed in the exam next month.
examples.chi: 我相信他下個月的考試會成功。

examples.eng: She thinks (that) her sister is the most talented student in school.
examples.chi: 她認為她的妹妹是學校裡最有天賦的學生。

examples.eng: We hope that you will join our club and share your experience with us.
examples.chi: 我們希望你會加入我們的俱樂部並與我們分享你的經驗。

examples.eng: Everyone knows (that) climate change is becoming a serious global problem.
examples.chi: 每個人都知道氣候變遷正成為一個嚴重的全球問題。

extension.tip: 判斷該使用受詞名詞子句的關鍵：看動詞後方是否有完整的主語+動詞組合。若有，通常需要用 that 連接；that 在受詞位置可省，但在形容詞子句（修飾名詞）中，當涉及人物時通常用 who，不用 that。記住受詞子句的 that 是可選連詞，不是必須的。

examples.test: I think (that) he is right. vs. I saw the boy (that/who) you mentioned.
examples.result: → 前者 that 可省為受詞子句；後者 that/who 為形容詞子句，修飾 boy，不可省略

examples.test: She hopes that her parents will be proud of her achievements.
examples.result: → 完整的受詞名詞子句，that 可省略為 She hopes her parents will be proud of her achievements.

examples.test: They said (that) the project would be delayed due to bad weather.
examples.result: → 受詞名詞子句，that 省略後更符合日常口語表達習慣

extension.note: 受詞 that 子句 = 名詞子句做受詞，that 可省不可不知；形容詞子句修飾名詞，that/who 不可省。

parts: she has the potential to become a successful entrepreneur.
exercises.sentence: I strongly believe that she has the potential to become a successful entrepreneur.
exercises.translation: 我強烈相信她有成為成功企業家的潛力。

parts: the Internet has changed our daily lives significantly.
exercises.sentence: Most people think (that) the Internet has changed our daily lives significantly.
exercises.translation: 大多數人認為網際網路顯著改變了我們的日常生活。

parts: the economy will recover soon and create more job opportunities.
exercises.sentence: We all hope that the economy will recover soon and create more job opportunities.
exercises.translation: 我們都希望經濟會很快復甦並創造更多工作機會。

parts: her research would revolutionize the treatment of cancer.
exercises.sentence: The scientist claimed (that) her research would revolutionize the treatment of cancer.
exercises.translation: 這位科學家聲稱她的研究將使癌症治療方式產生革命性改變。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適當的選項完成句子，該空格應填入名詞子句。
mc_exercises.question_eng: I think _______ you will enjoy the concert tomorrow night.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (that)。此句使用「think + that + S + V」結構，that 引導名詞子句作為 think 的受詞。B 選項 which 用於形容詞子句，C 選項 what 引導名詞子句但不能跟在 think 後面表示「認為」之意，D 選項 where 為地點副詞。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確選項完成句子，注意 that 的使用規則。
mc_exercises.question_eng: She hopes (______) her brother will pass the driving test on his first attempt.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (that)。hope 後接名詞子句時使用 that，此處用括號表示 that 可以省略（hope 是能省略 that 的常見動詞）。B 選項 to 用於不定詞結構，但 hope 後若接不定詞主詞必須相同；C 選項 for 無此用法；D 選項 if 引導條件子句不符此文脈。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據句意選擇正確選項，注意名詞子句與形容詞子句的區別。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The manager believes _______ the new marketing strategy will increase sales by 30% next quarter.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (that)。believe 後須接名詞子句，用 that 引導；子句內有完整主詞 the new marketing strategy 和動詞 will increase。B 選項 which 引導形容詞子句或非限制子句，C 選項 whose 為所有格關係詞，D 選項 when 為時間關係副詞，皆不符此文脈。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適當選項完成句子，考慮多個可能的句型結構。
mc_exercises.question_eng: Scientists have discovered _______ consuming moderate amounts of coffee daily may actually reduce the risk of certain diseases.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B (that)。discover 後接名詞子句表示「發現某事實」時用 that；子句「consuming moderate amounts of coffee daily may reduce the risk」是完整的主詞動詞結構。A 選項 what 作為名詞子句引詞時子句內無完整主詞；C 選項 how 表方式；D 選項 whether 表是否選擇，文意不符。

translation_exercises.answer: I think (that) it will rain tomorrow.
key_points: it will rain 為完整子句
hints: 句型框架：S + V + (that) + S + V
注意：that 在受詞子句中可省，但省略後意思不變

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 老師希望所有學生都能通過這次考試。
translation_exercises.answer: The teacher hopes (that) all students will pass the exam.
key_points: all students will pass 為完整子句
受詞子句內有複雜主詞
hints: 句型框架：S + V + (that) + S + V，注意受詞子句內主詞可以是複數或帶有修飾詞
易錯點：不要在子句前加介詞 of，受詞子句直接跟在及物動詞後

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 科學家相信全球暖化會對環境造成嚴重的影響。
translation_exercises.answer: Scientists believe (that) global warming will have a serious impact on the environment.
key_points: global warming will have 為完整子句
受詞子句內有複雜述語
hints: 句型框架：S + V + (that) + S + V，受詞子句內的述語可包含複雜結構如 have a...impact
易錯點：勿混淆與形容詞子句，此句 that 引導名詞子句作 believe 的受詞，而非修飾名詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我期望你已經完成了家庭作業，並且你會在明天的課堂上提交它。
translation_exercises.answer: I expect (that) you have finished your homework and (that) you will submit it in class tomorrow.
key_points: 兩個 that 引導的並列受詞子句
that 通常省略但結構仍完整
並列子句間用 and 連接
hints: 句型框架：S + V + (that) + S + V and (that) + S + V，多個受詞子句時第二個 that 可省或保留
易錯點：注意時態搭配（have finished 為現在完成式表示已完成；will submit 為未來式表示將來動作），勿使用非限制用法的形容詞子句
